hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB document checks into one orchestrated onboarding workflow that ensures structured approvals, risk-based reviews, and a complete audit trail for exchanges.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows when document checks stay disconnected
problem_description: Exchanges face delays and manual workload when identity and document verification results remain separated across multiple providers. This fragmentation weakens audit trails and complicates compliance decision-making during customer onboarding.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity and document verification outputs with sanctions and PEP screening into one risk-based onboarding workflow that links review actions, decisions and audit evidence for exchange compliance teams.
workflow_title: From document checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY organizes KYC and KYB document verification results into risk-based reviews, case management, decision logging and audit evidence for exchange onboarding compliance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One approval layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB document checks into risk-based workflows that preserve evidence, record decisions and provide clear audit trails for exchange onboarding.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges by connecting document verification, preserving audit evidence and enabling enterprise deployment for secure, compliant and defensible onboarding operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides exchanges with a connected compliance layer that structures KYC, KYB, document checks, sanctions screening and case workflows into auditable onboarding and approval processes.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support exchange document verification?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects document verification outputs into risk-based review workflows, linking identity, corporate data, and sanctions results for consistent and traceable exchange customer approval decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed audit logs, decision records and evidence packages for each onboarding case to support compliance review and regulatory audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect current KYC document providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates existing KYC and document verification providers, orchestrating their outputs into a single workflow without disrupting current technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or document providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or document providers but layers their outputs into structured, auditable compliance workflows for exchanges.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB document checks into controlled onboarding, risk-based review and audit-ready evidence for exchanges.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
